title: Community and Environment Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To stop something from happening or developing; to hold back.
choices: stifle
commemorate
advocate
rounds.answer: stifle
rounds.explanation: stifle: To stop something from happening or developing; to hold back.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The ability to develop into something greater in the future.
choices: stifle
commemorate
potential
rounds.answer: potential
rounds.explanation: potential: The ability to develop into something greater in the future.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Happening occasionally or at irregular intervals; not steady.
choices: commemorate
sporadic
stifle
rounds.answer: sporadic
rounds.explanation: sporadic: Happening occasionally or at irregular intervals; not steady.

rounds.prompt: What does 'misgiving' mean in this unit?
choices: A feeling of doubt or worry about something.

To remember and honour someone or something, often with a ceremony.
rounds.answer: A feeling of doubt or worry about something.
